race.comment: The penny has dropped for ALFA DUNDEE (5) who has strung three wins together on the bounce and is racing high on confidence of late. Hard to knock winning form and can continue the picket fence against this line-up. NOTES (10) has a win and a placing from three attempts over this track and trip and gets the services of Wiggins in the stirrups from the inside alley. Looms as the main danger. KALKANLI (6) didn't measure up in tougher grade last time out but will find this assignment much more to his liking. Can bounce back without surprising. CIGAR MAN (2) strips fitter third-up from the spell and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. In the mix. WATERMELON (3) next in line from the low draw.
